history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with black, short, messy hair stands in front of a large, circular mirror, taking a selfie with his phone. He is wearing a bright royal blue hoodie with a circular graphic on the chest, featuring a black and white illustration that appears to be a nature scene or a crest. The hoodie has a prominent front pocket and a drawstring. He's also wearing dark wash jeans and a red belt is visible at his waist. A silver chain hangs from his belt loop. The background reflected in the mirror shows a modern cafe interior with glass doors, tables, and chairs. A cup with a straw and lid sits on a table to his left. The lighting is soft and diffused, creating a slightly moody atmosphere. The overall color palette is dominated by the vibrant blue of the hoodie, contrasted with the dark tones of the background and jeans. The image has a candid, casual feel.
